sections.heading: 1. Introduction
sections.content: Welcome to mas0ng.com. We respect your privacy and aim to collect as little data as possible. This website is designed to function without requiring you to provide personal information.

sections.heading: 2. Data We Do Not Collect
sections.content: We do not ask users to create accounts or submit personal details. We do not collect names, email addresses, phone numbers, passwords, or payment information.

sections.heading: 3. Limited Technical Data
sections.content: This website is hosted on GitHub Pages and may use Cloudflare Workers to perform technical tasks. As a result, limited technical data such as IP address, browser type, device information, and request timestamps may be processed automatically by these providers for security and performance purposes. This data is not directly accessed, stored, or analysed by us.

sections.heading: 4. Custom GPTs and Automated Tools
sections.content: Some features connected to this site may use custom GPTs and Cloudflare Workers to perform actions requested by the user. These tools do not intentionally collect personal data and only process information required to complete the requested task. Data is processed transiently and is not used to build user profiles.

sections.heading: 5. Cookies
sections.content: mas0ng.com does not use tracking cookies. However, GitHub and Cloudflare may use essential cookies or similar technologies required for security, rate limiting, and basic site functionality.

sections.heading: 6. Your Rights
sections.content: If you are located in the United Kingdom or European Union, you have rights under data protection laws. As we do not store personal data, most requests will simply confirm that no user-identifiable information is held.

sections.heading: 7. Contact
sections.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, you can contact us at privacy@mas0ng.com.
